item.title: Billwise
item.description: A bill management application for restaurants with meal and drink entries, service charges, discounts, and sales reports, built-in Python and Flask.

item.title: Corpse
item.description: This digital spin on "Exquisite Corpse" lets two writers build a story in turns, each only seeing the other's last sentence, fostering a uniquely spontaneous and collaborative narrative.

item.title: Interactive Visualization COVID-19
item.description: Tableau visualization for tracking COVID-19 spread across Europe, presenting insights on case numbers and mortality rates to facilitate understanding of the pandemic's impact.

item.title: Laborum excepteur
item.description: Instructions for making spicy tuna hand rolls. Adipisicing eiusmod nulla officia ut voluptate non aute.

item.title: Enim qui sint
item.description: One goal of Creative Commons is to increase the amount of openly licensed creativity in “the commons” — the body of work freely available for legal use, sharing, repurposing, and remixing. Through the use of CC licenses, millions of people around the world have made their photos, videos, writing, music, and other creative content available for any member of the public to use.
